parsed_review.summary: CP00-599 (Risk C, 150 units, RP19.P06.M06.S09-RP19.P07.M03.S10) passes independent read-only review. The pack-level claim is honest and not over-claimed: manifest.json and command-evidence.json both record production_ready:false, runtime_ready:false, implementation_layer:descriptor, status implemented_pending_review, no_real_data:true, writes_product_state:false, with enterprise_trust_not_claimed_from_local_validation:true. The descriptor-only/no-write/no-real-data boundary is verified in code — a package-wide grep for filesystem/network/process/child_process/exec/fetch APIs returned zero matches, and every CP599 output is an Object.freeze'd descriptor stamped with ~40 negative runtime attestations via freezeCp599Result (service.js:2046). All 7 required_public_exports exist (service.js:2094/2127; validators.js:2944/2979/3035/3056/3079); deliverable, micro-title, and micro-phase distributions are internally consistent and sum to 150 across the registry constant, manifest, validator, contract projection, and plan, with deviation_from_plan:false (closeout-pack-plan.json:424). The contract is pinned to code via deepEqual in the validation script, and model.test.js:1113-1169 asserts coverage, descriptor-only rows, and authority boundaries; command-evidence records npm test, npm run validate, rp19:client-portal-core:validate, and git diff --check at exit 0. Claude remains a read-only, non-final reviewer (review-request read_only:true, tools Read/Grep/Glob, forbidden_tools_present:false; claude_is_final_approval:false), and Hermes is used only for descriptor evidence packet/receipt handling, not product runtime (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false). CP178+ review hardening blockers (auth failure, zero-byte stdout, malformed JSON, fenced JSON with prose, tool-call-shaped output, missing fields, final-approval/enterprise-trust claims) are encoded in forbidden_review_evidence (registry.js:600); the readiness auth preflight passed with non-empty valid JSON and there are no prior invalid review artifacts to reject. Post-review evidence files (claude-review-result, adjudication, construction-inspection) are correctly absent because they are produced later in the hardened sequence. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
